payload.label: dresser
payload.long_description: Partial/edge crop of a dark brown wooden dresser (approx. 1.2 m from camera) showing multiple paneled drawer fronts with small metal knobs and bar handles, slightly glossy finish and visible molding around drawer edges; top and left side are cut off by the image border.

message.content: {"label":"dresser","short_description":"dark wooden multi-drawer dresser edge-cropped","long_description":"Partial/edge crop of a dark brown wooden dresser (approx. 1.2 m from camera) showing multiple paneled drawer fronts with small metal knobs and bar handles, slightly glossy finish and visible molding around drawer edges; top and left side are cut off by the image border.","attributes":["dark brown stain","wooden material","multiple drawers","paneled drawer fronts","metal knobs and bar handles","slight glossy finish","molding around drawers","edge-cropped/partial"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
